name: Boca Raton GreenMarket
description: Saturday morning market at Royal Palm Place. Fresh produce, artisan goods, smoothies, and a chill vibe. Easier parking than Delray's market.

name: Yoga on the Green at Mizner
description: Free community yoga on the Mizner Park green space. Bring your own mat, all levels. Great way to start Sunday.

name: Boca Run Club
description: Wednesday evening run starting from Mizner Park. 3 or 5 mile options. All paces, the group sticks together. Usually grab drinks after.

name: Guided Snorkel Tour
description: Guided snorkeling at Red Reef's artificial reef. They provide gear and teach you what you're looking at. Great for first-timers.

name: Sea Turtle Walk
description: Guided nighttime sea turtle walk during nesting season. You might see a mama loggerhead lay her eggs. Reservations required and they sell out fast.

name: Storytime at Sugar Sand
description: Weekly storytime for kids at the community center. Songs, stories, and crafts. Ages 2-5 but younger siblings are welcome.

name: Monthly Fishing Tournament
description: Casual monthly tournament off the pier. Small entry fee, prizes for biggest catch. Regulars are friendly and will share tips.

name: Art After Dark at Mizner
description: Monthly evening event at the Boca Museum and Mizner Park area. Live music, food vendors, and the museum stays open late. Free to walk around.

name: Sunrise Paddleboard Session
description: Early morning SUP on glass-flat Intracoastal water. The sunrise from the water is unreal. Boards included in the tour price.

name: Sunset Kayak Tour
description: Guided sunset kayak tour through the Intracoastal mangroves. You'll see herons, fish jumping, and an incredible sunset. Bring a waterproof phone case.

name: Pickleball Open Play
description: Open pickleball courts with organized play. All levels, just show up with a paddle or borrow one. Gets competitive but everyone's having fun.

name: Wednesday Pickleball
description: Midweek pickleball session. Same setup as Monday. The regulars are there rain or shine.

name: Guided Nature Trail Walk
description: Ranger-led walk through the nature trails at Spanish River. Learn about native plants, birds, and the coastal ecosystem. Free with park admission.

name: Community Yoga Class
description: Donation-based community yoga class. Open to all levels, great intro if you've never tried the studio. The vibe is welcoming, not intimidating.

name: Late Night Thursday at the Museum
description: Extended hours with talks, tours, and sometimes live music. Way less crowded than weekend visits and a great midweek cultural fix.

name: Butterfly Garden Tour
description: Short guided tour through the butterfly garden. Volunteers know every species and the kids love catching them landing on their arms.

name: Morning Boot Camp
description: Outdoor boot camp in the park. Bodyweight exercises, running, and core work. The trainer doesn't mess around but you'll feel great after.

name: Wednesday Boot Camp
description: Same boot camp crew, middle of the week. Perfect for breaking up the work week with some sweat.

name: Brotherhood Appreciation Night
description: BOGO draft beers all night for Brotherhood members. A thank-you night for the regulars who make Barrel of Monks what it is.

name: Blood Orange Bliss Release
description: New seasonal release: Blood Orange Bliss, a traditional gose brewed with blood orange — tart, citrusy, light-bodied. Available on draft only.

name: Comedy Attic at Barrel of Monks
description: Live comedy night at the brewery. Doors at 7:45 PM, show at 8:00 PM. Grab a pint and settle in.

name: Riff Roulette
description: A live music roulette night — you never know what you're going to get. Doors at 7:00 PM, show at 7:30 PM. Brotherhood members get in for $5.

name: 11th Anniversary Party + Neon Skyline Release
description: Barrel of Monks turns 11. All-you-can-drink from 4-8 PM ($45 ticket) includes unlimited draft pours, a bottle of the anniversary beer 'This One Goes To 11,' and access to exclusive drafts. Live music by Datura from 5-9 PM. Neon Skyline, a West Coast IPA brewed with Tank Brew Co. (6.5% ABV), also drops tonight.

name: St. Patrick's Day Celebration
description: BOGO draft beers all day plus a Reuben Spring Roll special from Cheffrey Eats food truck. Wear green.

name: Paint & Sip with Classpop!
description: Guided painting class inside the brewery. All supplies included. Sip a Belgian ale while you create. Tickets: $44.

name: ACS Bingo Night
description: Bingo night in partnership with ACS. Doors at 5:45 PM, game starts at 6:00 PM. Tickets: $10.
